categories.name: Safety Services
categories.description: Comprehensive safety consultation and management services to ensure workplace compliance and protect your workforce.

services.name: Safety Consultation & Site Inspection
services.description: Our safety consultants conduct thorough site inspections and baseline risk assessments to identify and address potential hazards in your workplace.

services.name: SHERQ Management Systems
services.description: Implementation of comprehensive SHERQ systems to improve, protect and sustain the health and safety of all people on your premises.
features: Safe work procedures and risk assessments

services.name: Project Health and Safety Files
services.description: Professional management of your safety files with nationwide workshops to ensure OHS Act compliance and protect against criminal liability.
features: Safety file workshops across South Africa

services.name: Safety Officer Placement
services.description: Experienced safety specialists placed on-site to manage day-to-day safety activities and maintain comprehensive documentation.

categories.name: Health Services
categories.description: Occupational health services to protect employee wellbeing and ensure regulatory compliance.

services.name: Occupational Health Programs
services.description: Comprehensive health programs designed to protect and improve employee health in the workplace.

categories.name: Environmental Services
categories.description: Environmental compliance and sustainability services to help your business meet regulatory requirements and protect the planet.

services.name: Environmental Compliance
services.description: Extensive experience helping businesses meet regulatory requirements and adopt sustainability best practices.

services.name: Environmental Audits
services.description: Comprehensive environmental assessments to ensure compliance and identify improvement opportunities.

categories.name: Quality & Auditing Services
categories.description: Systematic evaluations of workplace systems to ensure compliance, mitigate risks, and foster a culture of safety.

services.name: Health and Safety Audits
services.description: Comprehensive audits to improve operations and safety culture through systematic evaluation of workplace systems.

services.name: Quality Management
services.description: Quality system implementation and continuous improvement processes to ensure excellence.

additionalServices.name: PPE & Safety Equipment Supply
additionalServices.description: Supply of personal protective equipment, safety signs, and other safety materials.

additionalServices.name: Risk Assessments
additionalServices.description: Comprehensive risk assessments and safe work procedures/method statement drafting.

additionalServices.name: Site Establishment
additionalServices.description: Construction site establishment and compliance management.

additionalServices.name: Site Audits
additionalServices.description: Regular site audits to ensure ongoing compliance and safety.
